detailedDescription:
16GB DDR5 dual-channel kit.
Great balance of capacity and speed for gaming on modern AM5 and Intel platforms.
additionalSpecs:
Capacity: 16GB
Generation: DDR5
Bandwidth: Up to 51.2 GB/s per channel (DDR5-6400)
Voltage: 1.1V (1.35V+ for XMP/EXPO OC)
Slots: 2 x 8GB (dual-channel)
On-Die ECC: Yes
XMP 3.0 / EXPO Support: Yes
Compatible Sockets: LGA1700, AM5
